title: ERD Zoom In/Out and Auto-Fit Controls
story: As a DataTools Pro user viewing an ERD, I want explicit zoom in/out and auto-fit buttons, so that I can orient myself in the diagram without relying on non-obvious trackpad gestures.
description:
## Context
Zooming and panning the ERD currently relies on mouse/trackpad gestures which are not discoverable for all users.

## Behavior
Toolbar buttons are added for:
- **Zoom In** — increases diagram scale
- **Zoom Out** — decreases diagram scale
- **Auto-Fit** — scales and centers the diagram to fit all nodes within the visible window
acceptance_criteria: Zoom In button increases the diagram zoom level
Zoom Out button decreases the diagram zoom level
Auto-Fit button scales and centers the diagram to fit the viewport
Buttons are clearly labeled or use recognizable icons
Zoom controls work alongside existing trackpad/mouse gestures
ux_changes: New zoom in, zoom out, and auto-fit toolbar buttons for explicit diagram navigation control.
implementation_notes: Uses GoJS CommandHandler.increaseZoom(), decreaseZoom(), and zoomToFit() APIs.
comment_summary: Reporter attached a screenshot showing the zoom controls in the toolbar.
